ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing The I & A And Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-04-2022 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing The I & A And Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Sep-13-2022 Continued To Oct-04-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Gadi Zohar, via Zoom, for Victoria Chastain, Executor.

Mr. Zohar reports that the pending tax issue was resolved last week and that an Inventory and Appraisal was mailed to the court yesterday. Mr. Zohar advises that he intends to file a petition for final distribution within the next few weeks.

The matter is continued to Oct-04-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Martinez. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing The I & A And Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-09-2022 Continued To Sep-13-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing The I & A And Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jun-21-2022 Continued To Aug-09-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Gadi Zohar, for and with Victoria Chastain, Executor.

Mr. Zohar reports on the issues causing the delay in closing this matter and that his client is the sole heir and beneficiary and has discussed the importance of closing the estate. Mr. Zohar advises of the estate being ready to close but that there is a pending tax issue which needs to be resolved before he can file a petition and that he expects that issue to be resolved by September 15th of this year and asks for a continuance of this matter to a date after that. The court reiterates that it expects this matter to be closed soon and advises Mr. Zohar that the court will be expecting the filing of an Inventory and Appraisal and a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration before the next hearing date.

The matter is continued to Aug-09-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. Counsel is advised to file the Inventory and Appraisal and a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration by Aug-02-2022.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Bastain. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing The I & A And Close Of Estate
Off Calendar May-17-2022 Continued To Jun-21-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Gadi Zohar, via Zoom, for Victoria Chastain, Executor.

Counsel reports that he has not heard from his client in about eight (8) weeks and has made several unsuccessful attempts to contact her via different methods. Counsel reports that the real property was sold in 2010 and the proceeds placed into an account. The funds were then escheated. The court confirms that there is no bond in this matter. Counsel reports that he is considering filing a motion to withdraw since he is unable to contact his client. The court advises that it may order an accounting and for him to diligently continue to try to contact his client.

After additional discussion, the matter is continued to Jun-21-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Gomez. Not Reported.
